text.value: SAUDAT ABUBAKAR MEMORIAL ARABIC & ISLAMIC SCHOOL
Does the community leader consent to participating in this survey?
If you are the only recorder on your team, this may be called a "team ID". Recorder ID is the 2-digit code assigned to you or your team.
NYSC ANCHAU TAKALAFIYA PRIMARY SCHOOL (UBE FADA ANCHAU TAKALAFIYA) (124)
LGEA ANGUWAN BISO VILLAGE PRIMARY SCHOOL (128)
UBE ANGUWAN MALAM SAMBO PRIMARY SCHOOL (134)
UBE UNGWAN LIMAN SUDDU PRIMARY SCHOOL (132)
LGEA UNGWAN SARKIN YAKI KUBAU PRIMARY SCHOOL (135)
